description: The y-axis tick marks are placed at irregular intervals (e.g., €0M, €5M, €15M, €20M, €40M, €55M, €80M, €95M, €110M, €125M), creating uneven visual spacing between gridlines. This distorts the reader's perception of how values are distributed — some regions of the chart appear compressed while others look stretched, making it difficult to accurately judge distances and relationships between data points.
